# viznoir

> Cinema-quality science visualization for AI agents via MCP (Model Context Protocol).

## About

viznoir is an open-source MCP server that brings VTK-powered scientific visualization
to AI coding assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor. It provides 22 tools for
headless rendering, slicing, contouring, volume rendering, and animating simulation
data — no ParaView GUI needed. One prompt produces publication-quality renders.

viznoir is the only MCP server purpose-built for engineering simulation post-processing.
It supports CFD (OpenFOAM, CGNS), FEA (Abaqus, Nastran), SPH (DualSPHysics), medical
imaging, molecular visualization, and planetary science data.

## Quick Start

```
pip install mcp-server-viznoir
```

Add to Claude Desktop config:
```json
{ "mcpServers": { "viznoir": { "command": "mcp-server-viznoir" } } }
```

## Key Capabilities

- 22 MCP tools for simulation post-processing
- Cinematic rendering: 3-point lighting, SSAO, FXAA, PBR materials, auto-camera
- 50+ input formats via VTK + meshio (VTK, VTU, VTP, CGNS, STL, OBJ, PLY, NetCDF, etc.)
- Headless GPU rendering (EGL) — no display server required
- Domain auto-detection: CFD, FEA, SPH, medical, molecular, generic
- Adaptive resolution: analyze (480p), preview (720p), publish (1080p)
- Agent Harness: autonomous inspect → plan → render → evaluate → refine loop
- 1500+ tests, 97% code coverage, MIT license

## Tools (22)

- inspect_data: Explore file metadata (fields, timesteps, bounds)
- render: Single-view visualization with colormaps
- cinematic_render: Publication-quality rendering with lighting and materials
- slice: Cut through 3D data with arbitrary planes
- contour: Extract isosurfaces at specified values
- clip: Remove portions of data with cutting planes
- streamlines: Flow visualization for vector fields
- compare: Side-by-side or diff comparison of two datasets
- batch_render: Render multiple fields in one call
- volume_render: Direct volume rendering with transfer functions
- animate: Time series or orbit animation → GIF/MP4
- split_animate: Multi-pane synchronized animation
- extract_stats: Statistical summary of field data
- plot_over_line: Sample data along a line → CSV/chart
- integrate_surface: Surface integration (flux, area-averaged quantities)
- probe_timeseries: Sample field at a point across timesteps
- preview_3d: Export to glTF/glB for interactive 3D viewing
- inspect_physics: Topology analysis + case context extraction
- analyze_data: AI-guided data insight extraction
- compose_assets: Multi-asset composition and layout
- execute_pipeline: Full pipeline DSL for advanced operations
- auto_postprocess: Autonomous post-processing orchestration

## Supported Domains

- CFD: OpenFOAM (.foam), Fluent (.cas/.msh), CGNS, Plot3D
- FEA: Abaqus (.inp), Nastran (.bdf/.op2), CalculiX
- SPH: DualSPHysics (.bi4), custom VTK particle data
- Medical: DICOM, NIfTI, VTI volumes
- Molecular: PDB protein structures, electron density maps
- Geoscience: NetCDF, seismic/ocean/climate data
- General: STL, OBJ, PLY, glTF for 3D geometry
